title: Board permission problem

posts.author: shakeel23 (Shakeel)
posts.cookedHtml:
I have identified an issue with board permissions. Specifically, the first column, where the update option is available, cannot be locked with permissions set to anything other than “View” or “Comment.” As a result, team members are able to edit or delete the item/client name, which could have a significant impact on the business.

I recommend developing a feature that would allow us to lock columns based on specific permission requirements, ensuring better control and security over critical data.
